---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What user or contributor problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposal

Describe the change you want to see.

## UX notes

If this changes UI behavior, describe the desired interaction and any important edge cases.

## Scope

What is in scope, and what should explicitly stay out of scope?

## Validation ideas

How should we verify this works once implemented?
